SELECT * FROM glob('*.png') AS image_files WHERE filename LIKE '%.png';
SELECT f.filename FROM test_files f JOIN glob('*') g ON f.filename = g.file;
SELECT g.file FROM (SELECT * FROM glob('*.jpg') UNION SELECT * FROM glob('*.png')) AS g;
WITH glob_results AS (SELECT * FROM glob('*')) SELECT * FROM glob_results WHERE file LIKE '%.pdf';
SELECT glob(f.file_path) FROM additional_files f WHERE f.file_path LIKE 'temp/%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM glob('*.txt') AS txt_files WHERE file LIKE '%.txt';
SELECT * FROM glob('data/*') AS data_files WHERE file NOT LIKE '%temp%';
WITH matched_files AS (SELECT * FROM glob('*')) SELECT file FROM matched_files ORDER BY file ASC LIMIT 5;
